name: Joe Miller Park
description: Come play pickleball at Joe Miller Park in Elloree, SC! There are 4 outdoor asphalt courts. These are dedicated courts with permanent lines and nets. The courts cannot be reserved. Amenities include lights. The courts are free.

name: Lake Marion Highschool
description: Come play pickleball at Lake Marion Highschool in Santee, SC! There are 4 outdoor concrete courts. These are dedicated courts with permanent lines and nets. The courts cannot be reserved. The courts are free. Players have access to restrooms.
open_play_schedule: The school has priority over use. See the sign at the bathroom for rules of use and reservations.

name: Orangeburg County YMCA
description: Come play pickleball at Orangeburg County YMCA in Orangeburg, SC! There are 4 indoor wood courts. The lines are permanent, and portable nets are available. A one-time fee is required to play. Players have access to restrooms. Reservations are not available.
fees: Fee required — Included in YMCA membership, but visitors can pay a day fee.
